title: Rapid Prototyping with Codex and Figma Integration
description: Transform Figma designs into interactive prototypes using OpenAI's Codex app with one-click MCP integration.

cards.title: Turn Figma Designs Into Live Prototypes
cards.body: Learn to use OpenAI's Codex app with Figma integration to transform static designs into interactive prototypes in minutes. You'll set up the MCP connection, generate prototypes from design links, and refine the output.

cards.title: What is MCP Integration?
cards.body: MCP (Model Context Protocol) lets Codex directly access your Figma files and design system components. Instead of exporting images or copying designs manually, the AI reads your actual design tokens and components.

analogy.text: Like plugging your design tool directly into the AI's brain — no translation needed

bullets: One-click setup through the OpenAI app
Direct access to your Figma design system
Preserves component relationships and tokens

cards.title: Install the OpenAI App
cards.body: First, download the OpenAI app and navigate to Settings to set up the Figma integration.
bullets: Download the OpenAI app from your app store
Open the app and go to Settings
Look for the MCP or Figma integration option

source.author: OpenAI
source.description: Setting up the one-click MCP install with Figma

cards.title: Connect Your Figma Account
cards.body: Enable the Figma skill by logging into your Figma account through the app.
bullets: Click the Figma integration option in Settings
Sign in with your Figma credentials when prompted
Enable the 'Figma skill' in your skill settings
cards.safe: Your Figma login is secure — the app only accesses files you explicitly share

cards.title: Quick Check
cards.question: What's the main advantage of MCP integration over traditional design handoffs?

options.text: It directly reads design tokens and components

cards.correctFeedback: Exactly! MCP gives Codex direct access to your design system, not just visual exports.
cards.wrongFeedback: Not quite. The key is that MCP reads your actual design tokens and components, not just images.

cards.title: Copy Your Figma Frame Link
cards.body: Get the direct link to the Figma frame or page you want to prototype.
bullets: Open your Figma file
Select the frame or page you want to convert
Right-click and choose 'Copy link' or use the share button
Make sure you're copying a frame-specific link, not just the file link

source.author: OpenAI
source.description: Copying a frame link directly from Figma

cards.title: Paste Link Into Codex
cards.body: Start the prototype generation by pasting your Figma link into the Codex chat.
bullets: Open the chat interface in the OpenAI app
Paste your Figma frame link
Send the message to kick off the build process
cards.safe: The app will show a hot-reload preview so you can watch the prototype build in real-time

cards.title: Hot-Reload Preview Magic
cards.body: Watch as Codex builds your prototype in real-time. The hot-reload feature refreshes the preview as each component gets generated, so you can spot issues early.
bullets: Components appear as they're built
Design system tokens are automatically applied
You can identify problems before generation completes

source.author: OpenAI
source.description: Watching the hot-reload preview as Codex generates the prototype

cards.title: Prototype Generated!
cards.body: Your Figma design is now a working interactive prototype. You've successfully connected your design system and generated about 80-90% of the final result.

cards.title: The 80-90% Rule
cards.body: Codex typically gets you 80-90% of the way there on the first try. The remaining work involves fine-tuning styles, removing unwanted elements, and adding interactive behaviors.
bullets: Design system components are properly mapped
Layout and spacing are mostly accurate
Some borders or styling may need adjustment
Interactive behaviors need to be added separately

source.author: OpenAI
source.description: Comparing the generated prototype to the original Figma design

cards.title: Refine Styling Issues
cards.body: Use follow-up prompts to fix common styling problems in your generated prototype.
bullets: Remove unwanted borders or outlines
Adjust spacing and alignment
Fix color inconsistencies
Match typography to your design system
cards.code: Remove the border from the main card component and adjust the padding to match the original design

cards.title: Add Interactive Behaviors
cards.body: Enhance your prototype with interactive elements that static designs can't show.
bullets: Add click-out dismissal for modals
Implement hover states and transitions
Create state changes between screens
Add form validation and feedback
cards.code: Add a click-outside-to-close behavior for the chat modal and implement smooth transitions between states
cards.warn: Be specific about the interaction you want — vague prompts may not give you the exact behavior

cards.title: Knowledge Check
cards.question: Why is interactive prototyping especially valuable for AI-powered interfaces?

options.text: AI outputs are static and predictable
AI outputs are dynamic and non-deterministic
AI doesn't work well with static designs

cards.correctFeedback: Right! AI interfaces have unpredictable outputs, so you need interactive prototypes to stress-test edge cases.
cards.wrongFeedback: Not quite. AI outputs are actually dynamic and unpredictable, which is why interactive prototypes are so valuable.

cards.title: 2-3x Faster Prototyping
cards.body: This workflow dramatically speeds up the design-to-prototype process. Instead of building components from scratch or dealing with export workflows, you go from Figma link to interactive prototype in minutes.
bullets: No manual component building required
Design system automatically preserved
Real-time preview shows progress
Perfect for testing AI interface edge cases

source.author: OpenAI
source.description: Explaining the speed benefits and use cases for AI interface prototyping

cards.title: You're a Prototyping Pro!
cards.body: You've mastered rapid prototyping with Codex and Figma. You can now transform static designs into interactive prototypes in minutes, preserving your design system and testing AI interface edge cases effectively.
